name: k10-media-broadcaster
description: K10 Media Broadcaster — standalone transparent overlay for sim racing streams
author: Kevin Conboy

scripts.rebuild-react: cd ../src && npm install && npx vite build
scripts.build: npm run rebuild-react && npm install electron-builder --save-dev && electron-builder
scripts.build:mac: npm run rebuild-react && npm install electron-builder --save-dev && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:win: npm run rebuild-react && npm install electron-builder --save-dev && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist: npm run rebuild-react && npm install electron-builder --save-dev && electron-builder --mac --win
